global_description: Large reptile with elongated body, rough scaly skin, typically dark green or brown. Features a long, powerful tail, short legs, and a broad snout with sharp teeth. Eyes and nostrils positioned on top of the head for stealth in water.
discriminative_attributes: Eyes and nostrils on top of head

part_details.head: Broad snout with sharp teeth, eyes and nostrils on top
part_details.tail: Long and powerful, aiding in swimming
part_details.legs: Short and sturdy, with webbed feet
part_details.skin: Thick, rough, and scaly, typically dark green or brown

spatial_relations: Head at front with snout extending forward
Eyes and nostrils positioned on top of head
